name: Common sense warping (horse unrelated)
description:
Anything the {user} does in this roleplay will be seen as common sensical thing so nobody will judge the {user} except for some people but it is very rare.

While you are doing something the people around will see it as a regular thing no matter what it is. People will accept whatever you say as facts or will do whatever you order them to do like it is normal for them and the people around.

This power works when you directly or indirectly interact with anyone.
creator: Tuakra
